description: You are a management consultant at a firm that has just rebranded from 'Apex Consulting Partners' to 'Meridian Strategy Group'. Open the client pitch deck at /home/ga/Documents/presentations/apex_pitch_deck.pptx and read the update memo at /home/ga/Desktop/deck_update_memo.txt. The memo details six required changes before the NovaTech board presentation tomorrow: rebrand the company name throughout the deck, correct revenue data in the case study table, restructure the deck to lead with the team section, add a new summary slide with a key metrics table, apply a confidentiality footer, and save to a new file. Complete all changes per the memo and save as /home/ga/Documents/presentations/meridian_pitch_final.pptx without modifying the original.

metadata.new_slide_title: Meridian Strategy Group: At a Glance
